title: Epitaph and relief for Kissos and Tryphon

material._: Fine to medium-grained, homogeneous, white marble, likely Parian-1, Parian-2. Optical microscopy: heteroblastic fabric with triple points, mosaic microstructure. Digital microscopy: heteroblastic fabric (identification based on pXRF, digital microscopy, XRD, optical microscopy, stable isotopes analysis, EPR, LA-ICP-MS)

provenanceFound._: First observed outside the 'porta sud', in the former Garden of the 'Compagnia di Gesu'

museum.name: Museo Archeologico Regionale Antonino Salinas
museum.description: Partially reopened following extensive restoration work. Comprehensive collection of archaeological material, predominantly from the West of the island, with an important Etruscan collection.

location.address: Centre of Palermo, Piazza Olivella 24, 90100 - Palermo
